title: Cross-Galactic Mining
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Cross-Galactic Mining''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation. They mined the [[Grillis]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] in the [[Atrig system]], and despite being primarily a mining corporation, controlled the exporting of [[Kyrf (liquor)|kyrf]] from [[Korbin]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
